HGSS.114.0000:
I was challenged to a battle
downstairs.\f
It’s rough down there. You’d better
be careful.
HGSS.114.0001:
You look like an earnest youth.
How come you ended up in\r
Team Rocket...?
HGSS.114.0002:
Team Rocket never stops bothering
people, do they?
HGSS.114.0003:
There are some shops downstairs...\f
But there are also Trainers.
I’m scared to go down there.
HGSS.114.0004:
Yes...
Team Rocket can use the tunnel, too.
HGSS.114.0005:
All the people working at the tunnel
left. No one wants Team Rocket to\r
give them a hard time.
HGSS.114.0006:
Lyra: Hi, [0103,0000,0000].
You are just in time!\f
HGSS.114.0007:
Lyra: When you follow this tunnel,
you’ll see a Dress-Up Shop.\f
That’s where your Pokémon can put on
Accessories to dress up and\r
take pictures!\f
By the way, here is the Fashion Case!\f
Did you say you want it?
I knew it!\f
This is a present from me!\f
HGSS.114.0008:
Lyra: Keep Accessories in the
Fashion Case, OK?\f
I should get going.
See you!\f

You are just in time!\f
